summary: Iteration 8 Mobile Optimization Testing Complete - All features working correctly on mobile viewport (390x844). Backend: 13/13 tests passed. Frontend: All mobile optimization changes verified - input overflow fixed, chatbot positioned correctly, all forms and modals work on mobile.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mobile optimization changes are verified and working. All CSS changes (min-w-0, overflow-hidden, responsive font sizes, chatbot positioning) are functioning correctly. No regressions found.

mobile_ui_tests.homepage_loads: PASSED - Hero section visible on 390px viewport
mobile_ui_tests.transfer_tab_visible: PASSED - Transfer tab with On Chain badge
mobile_ui_tests.withdraw_tab_visible: PASSED - Withdraw tab with Off Chain badge
mobile_ui_tests.large_number_input_transfer: PASSED - 11-digit number (99999999999) stays within input box
mobile_ui_tests.large_number_input_withdraw: PASSED - 11-digit number stays within input on withdraw form
mobile_ui_tests.min_amount_error: PASSED - Red error shown for 5000 IDR (below minimum)
mobile_ui_tests.fee_estimation: PASSED - Fee box visible when amount entered
mobile_ui_tests.method_picker_modal: PASSED - Opens and shows banks/e-wallets with logos
mobile_ui_tests.withdraw_destination_modal: PASSED - Shows bank fees (Rp 2,500) and e-wallet fees (Rp 1,000)
mobile_ui_tests.chatbot_button_position: PASSED - Positioned at bottom-[68px], above Emergent badge
mobile_ui_tests.faq_page: PASSED - Navigates correctly, shows 8 FAQ items
mobile_ui_tests.signin_flow: PASSED - Modal opens, credentials accepted, login successful

mobile_optimization_verified.input_overflow_fix: VERIFIED - min-w-0, w-0 flex-1, overflow-hidden prevent number overflow
mobile_optimization_verified.responsive_fonts: VERIFIED - text-sm on mobile, text-base on desktop
mobile_optimization_verified.chatbot_positioning: VERIFIED - bottom-[68px] on mobile (sm:bottom-5 on desktop)
mobile_optimization_verified.ios_zoom_prevention: VERIFIED - font-size: 16px !important on inputs for mobile

mobile_optimization.details: All CSS changes verified: input overflow fixed, chatbot positioned above Emergent badge, responsive fonts

transfer_form.details: Large numbers stay within input, min amount validation works, fee estimation displays correctly

withdraw_form.details: Large numbers handled, available balance shown, percentage buttons work

method_picker.details: Bank and e-wallet options with logos, fees, ETAs displayed correctly on mobile

chatbot.details: FAB button visible above Emergent badge, chat window opens correctly on mobile

authentication.details: Sign in modal works on mobile, form fills correctly
